description: bind:map on svelte-maplibre-gl conflicts with exactOptionalPropertyTypes — type mismatch on optional Map property
resolution: Use onload={(e) => { mapInstance = e.target as unknown as MapLibreMap; }} instead of bind:map

content: Svelte 5 stores use .svelte.ts files with $state/$derived/$effect rune globals — ESLint must declare these globals for both .svelte and .svelte.ts file blocks

name: exactOptionalPropertyTypes spread
description: Use ...(val !== undefined ? { key: val } : {}) for optional spread props instead of direct assignment to satisfy exactOptionalPropertyTypes

content: Tailwind 4: @import 'tailwindcss' in app.css, @tailwindcss/vite plugin in vite.config.ts, no tailwind.config.js needed
tRPC 11 Fetch adapter at /api/trpc/[...trpc] — all API routes go through tRPC routers, not SvelteKit endpoints. Auth via Lucia v3 + @lucia-auth/adapter-drizzle with text PK sessions

description: MapLibre 5 + esbuild: class fields not transpiled correctly by default
resolution: Set build.target: 'es2022' in vite.config.ts for native class fields without helper transforms

description: ESLint OOM when parsing .svelte-kit directory or using parserOptions.project with TypeScript
resolution: Global ignores FIRST (standalone { ignores: [...] }) to prevent .svelte-kit scanning. No parserOptions.project — syntax-only rules avoid TypeScript OOM

title: superjson transformer for tRPC
rationale: tRPC serializes Date objects as ISO strings over JSON, causing type mismatches (Layer.createdAt: Date but runtime string). superjson preserves Date/Map/Set through JSON round-trips. Added to both server init.ts and client trpc.ts. Eliminates all Date-serialization casts and lets component interfaces use Date directly.

content: Root eslint.config.js must exclude apps/web/** (has its own Svelte-aware config) and scripts/** (no tsconfig, runs via tsx). Without this, 39 errors from parserOptions.project mismatches, missing rune globals, and double-linting.

title: shared-map-operations
rationale: Extracted createMap/deleteMap/cloneMap/createFromTemplate to lib/server/maps/operations.ts. Both tRPC routers and dashboard form actions call shared functions with audit logging. Audit fires AFTER successful mutation, not before.

title: upload-editor-access
rationale: Upload endpoint now allows editor collaborators, not just map owners. Uses same owner-fast-path + collaborator check pattern as requireMapAccess.

name: annotation-thread-ui
description: AnnotationPanel thread expand/collapse: uses $state<string|null> for expandedAnnotationId + replyingTo. Thread replies fetched via {#await trpc.annotations.getThread.query({rootId})} inline in template — no extra reactive store needed.

name: annotation-object-service-pattern
description: Annotation service layer pattern: service.ts owns all business logic (access checks, validation, changelog), tRPC router is a thin adapter. Service uses typedExecute with raw SQL and rowToObject mapping for snake_case DB columns to camelCase AnnotationObject. exactOptionalPropertyTypes requires spread pattern in tRPC adapter: ...(val !== undefined ? { key: val } : {})

name: sidepanel-accordion-pattern
description: SidePanel accordion pattern: SidePanel.svelte uses Svelte 5 Snippet type for content injection. Sections defined as array of {id, label, icon, count?, content: Snippet}. One-open-at-a-time accordion controlled by parent via activeSection prop + onchange callback. Child components accept embedded?: boolean to hide their own headers when inside SidePanel.

title: unified-sidebar-consolidation
rationale: Consolidated 5 independent right-side panels (Annotations, Comments, Geoprocessing, Measure, Activity) into a single SidePanel accordion with 3 sections. Comments merged into AnnotationPanel (UI-only, separate backend). Measure merged into Analysis section with sub-tabs. Collaborators moved into ShareDialog. Design mode (Ctrl+backslash) hides everything except map+drawing tools.

name: connected-actions-wiring
description: Connected actions pattern: MapEditor coordinates draw→annotate→measure→activity via activeFeature state, featurePickMode, pendingMeasurementAnnotation, and logActivity helper. DrawActionRow auto-dismisses after 8s. Badge indicators use centroid() + declarative GeoJSONSource/CircleLayer/SymbolLayer. Measurement annotations render as dashed LineLayer/FillLayer with label SymbolLayer.

name: vector-tile-pagination
description: Large layers (>10k features) use Martin vector tiles for rendering + server-side paginated DataTable. VECTOR_TILE_THRESHOLD extracted to shared constant in lib/utils/constants.ts. MapEditor skips loadLayerData for large layers, uses viewport-based listPaged endpoint with debounced moveend + abort controller. DataTable supports mode='client'|'server' with pagination controls.

name: admin-trpc-router
description: Admin tRPC router pattern: adminProcedure middleware in init.ts (extends protectedProcedure with isAdmin check). Admin router at routers/admin.ts with CRUD procedures. Soft-delete via disabledAt column + session invalidation via lucia.invalidateUserSessions(). Duplicate email handled by catching PostgreSQL 23505 error code.

title: Soft-delete users via disabledAt timestamp
rationale: Hard delete causes cascade issues with maps, comments, audit logs (all have userId FKs with onDelete: set null). Soft-delete is reversible and preserves data integrity.

description: changelog.ts objectSnapshot() calls .toISOString() on createdAt/updatedAt but typedExecute returns raw SQL rows where timestamps are strings, not Date objects — crashes with 500 on annotations.create
resolution: Use instanceof Date guard: obj.createdAt instanceof Date ? obj.createdAt.toISOString() : String(obj.createdAt)

name: annotation-hover-tooltips
description: Annotation map layers (pins, regions, badges, measurements) use onmouseenter/onmouseleave on svelte-maplibre-gl layer components for hover tooltips. Separate hoveredAnnotation state from selectedAnnotation (click). AnnotationContent accepts compact prop for brief hover preview vs full click popup.

name: drawing-mode-cleanup
description: Three drawing flows (direct draw, annotation-after-draw, draw-after-annotation) share overlapping state flags (annotationRegionMode, featurePickMode, activeFeature, pendingMeasurementAnnotation). Centralized clearInteractionModes(keep?) function resets all flags except the one being entered. Called on: sidebar section change, design mode toggle, mode entry points, Escape key, and annotation completion.

DrawActionRow Annotate handler bug: clearInteractionModes() nullifies activeFeature before pickedFeature assignment reads it (MapEditor.svelte line 722-724). pickedFeature always ends up undefined from this path.
resolution: Capture activeFeature into a local const before calling clearInteractionModes(), then use the captured value for pickedFeature assignment.

title: Discriminated union for interaction modes
rationale: Research shows discriminated union pattern (type InteractionMode = idle|drawRegion|pickFeature|measure|activeFeature) is better than 5 scattered boolean flags. Current clearInteractionModes(keep?) works and is tested (35 tests) but doesn't enforce mutual exclusivity at the type level. Zero bundle cost vs 33KB XState. Compiler enforces exhaustive handling. Data bundled with mode variant prevents desync. Estimated 3-4 hour refactor.

description: Discriminated union in Svelte 5 effects: effects that read interactionState.type as a guard AND write interactionState create infinite loops — each write creates a new object reference, triggering re-run.
resolution: Use untrack() for all guard reads of the union state in effects that also write to it. When collapsing two independent flags (mode boolean + data) into a single union variant, conditionals that depended on the boolean must add a data-presence check (e.g. && !geometry) to replicate the old behavior.

content: @tanstack/svelte-query v6 is an ESM-only package — 'node -e require()' verification fails with ERR_PACKAGE_PATH_NOT_EXPORTED. Verify installation by checking package.json presence instead.

QueryClient singleton in src/lib/utils/query-client.ts (staleTime:30s, gcTime:5min, refetchOnWindowFocus:false, retry:1) wrapped by QueryClientProvider in (app)/+layout.svelte — all app routes share one client.

vite build fails in worktrees without .env (PUBLIC_MARTIN_URL missing from $env/static/public) — pre-existing env issue. Use npx vitest run to verify code correctness instead of vite build in CI-less worktrees.

name: tanstack-query-mutation-invalidation
description: TanStack Query mutation pattern in Svelte 5: createMutation(() => ({...})) at component top-level, with onSuccess invalidating queryClient.invalidateQueries(). Optimistic updates use onMutate to cancel queries + snapshot previous data + setQueryData, onError to rollback, onSettled to invalidate. Replace manual loadX() + $state with createQuery $derived values.

name: derived-annotation-pins-from-query-cache
description: Annotation pins derived from TanStack Query cache via $derived instead of manual loadAnnotationPins() + $effect. The annotationPinsQuery shares the same queryKey as AnnotationPanel's annotationsQuery, so mutations in AnnotationPanel automatically update MapEditor's pin/region/measurement GeoJSON.

title: onannotationsaved replaces onannotationchange
rationale: Data refresh handled by query cache invalidation. Callback now only manages interaction state transitions on created action.

name: transitionTo-centralized-mode-transitions
description: transitionTo() centralizes InteractionState + tool coordination: atomically sets interactionState and implied activeTool (drawRegion→polygon, pickFeature→select, idle from annotation modes→select). Uses untrack() internally for safe  usage. Replaces 17 manual transition sites.

name: annotation-thread-component
description: AnnotationThread.svelte: createQuery with queryKeys.annotations.thread({annotationId}), fetches via trpc.annotations.getThread, renders replies with AnnotationContent, auth-gated delete buttons. Delete mutation must invalidate ['annotations','getThread'] prefix to refresh thread UI.

MapLibre vector tile features have integer IDs, not database UUIDs — feat.id from queryRenderedFeatures is tile-internal. Must resolve via properties._id (GeoJSON source) or properties.id (Martin vector tiles)
resolution: Added resolveFeatureId() helper in MapEditor that checks properties._id then properties.id before falling back to feat.id

name: drawing-store-lifecycle
description: drawingStore at lib/stores/drawing.svelte.ts owns Terra Draw init/start/stop with generation-guarded async imports. Components wire event handlers (finish, save, measure) via drawingStore.instance after init resolves. Discriminated union DrawingState (idle|importing|ready|stopped) drives UI disabled states via drawingStore.isReady.

name: annotation-form-auto-open
description: AnnotationPanel auto-open pattern: $effect blocks that react to external props (pickedFeature, regionGeometry, pendingMeasurement) by setting formAnchorType + showForm=true when form is closed. Guard with !showForm to avoid clobbering in-progress forms. All three anchor context flows (feature pick, region draw, measurement) follow the same pattern.

name: feature-orphan-flagging
description: Feature orphan flagging: flagOrphanedAnnotations() in annotation service sets anchor.featureDeleted=true via jsonb_set on feature-anchored annotations. Called from features.delete tRPC procedure. AnnotationContent renders dimmed state with 'Feature deleted' badge when flag is set.

Effect prop callback cycle: $effect blocks that call prop callbacks (oncountchange, onrequestfeaturepick) track those callbacks as reactive dependencies. When parent re-renders produce new closure references, this creates effect_update_depth_exceeded.
resolution: Wrap callback invocations in untrack() so only data dependencies (e.g. annotationList.length, formAnchorType) are tracked, not the callback closures themselves.

name: localStorage-restore-guard
description: localStorage persistence with restore guard: Use a filterRestored flag to prevent save-effect from firing before the load-effect completes, avoiding reactive loops when persisting state to localStorage

name: tanstack-query-auth-guard
description: TanStack Query enabled guard for auth: Add enabled: !!userId to queries calling protectedProcedure to prevent silent auth errors on unauthenticated share/embed pages

title: silent-success-eliminated
rationale: Walking persona flows revealed asymmetric feedback: failures toasted but successes silent. Users anxious about whether actions worked.

name: viewport-persistence
description: Map viewport (center, zoom, bearing, pitch) persisted to localStorage per mapId on moveend, restored on mount. Key: felt-viewport-{mapId}. Shape-validated on load with silent fallback.

name: annotation-form-disabled-hint
description: Annotation form submit button uses complex disabled logic across 8 conditions (formType variants + anchor type). When adding validation hints, mirror the same disabled condition to keep hint and button state in sync.

name: annotation-anchor-update
description: Annotation service update() accepts optional anchor field for anchor-type conversion (e.g. feature→point). Uses sql.join for dynamic SET clauses. Schema, router, and service must all be updated together.

title: brownfield-hardening-iter-1-2-complete
rationale: 10 tasks fixing: cancel-reset, stale-image-url, orphaned-geometry-cleanup, import-poll-timeout, validation-hints, orphan-repair-action, escape-cancel-draw, tool-switch-confirm, blob-url-race. Annotation update schema extended to support anchor changes for orphan repair.

description: oncountchange effect in AnnotationPanel caused effect_update_depth_exceeded during map tile loading — callback triggered parent re-render which re-triggered the effect
resolution: Added previous-value deduplication guard (_prevAnnotationCount/_prevCommentCount) alongside existing untrack() wrapper

name: stable-maplibre-center-prop
description: Stable center prop for svelte-maplibre-gl: inline object literals like center={{ lng, lat }} create new references every render, causing synchronous setCenter→moveend→store→re-render loops (effect_update_depth_exceeded). Use a memoized $state + $effect.pre guard that only creates a new object when coordinates actually differ. Pair with equality guards in setViewport to prevent store churn on identical values.
setActiveTool dedup guard: new Set() creates fresh reference triggering spurious reactivity even when selectedFeatureIds was empty
resolution: Add same dedup guard as clearSelection(): skip writes when _selectedFeature is null and _selectedFeatureIds.size === 0

description: transitionTo missing featureSelected case left activeTool as drawing tool after handleFeatureDrawn
resolution: Add case featureSelected to transitionTo switch to reset tool to select

description: setActiveTool select cleared selection causing effect_update_depth_exceeded on feature click
resolution: Only clear selection for drawing tools (point/line/polygon), not select. Added explicit clearSelection in design mode cleanup.

description: MapLibre click handlers fire synchronously during Svelte 5 effect flush, overflowing the 1000-iteration depth counter when combined with initial mount of many svelte-maplibre-gl layers
resolution: Wrap state writes in queueMicrotask() to start a fresh flush cycle with its own counter

description: drawingStore.reset() inside $effect reads _state.status (tracked) then writes _state = { status: idle } (new ref) — invisible cycle: initTerraDraw → syncToolToTerraDraw → initTerraDraw. 10 prior commits missed this because no effect-level instrumentation existed.
resolution: No-op guard in reset() when already idle + untrack() around reset()/stop() calls in effect body. General rule: store methods with internal guards create hidden tracked reads when called from effects.

name: effect-cycle-diagnostic-tracker
description: Labeled effectEnter/effectExit + store mutation() logging with flush-cycle tick counter and automatic cycle detection. Instrument all $effect blocks with component-prefixed labels (ME:, MC:, AP:, DT:), log store mutations with caller context. Runtime toggle: window.__EFFECT_DEBUG. Immediately reveals which effects are looping and what mutations connect them. See apps/web/src/lib/debug/effect-tracker.ts.

content: All SvelteKit form actions that return fail() must use { error: string } as the key. The root layout  checks 'error' in form — using 'message' silently fails.

description: Dashboard form actions used { message } key in fail() but error effect only checked { error } key
resolution: Standardized all form actions to use { error } key

title: Single root +error.svelte
rationale: All routes share same error UI needs; per-group pages add maintenance cost without benefit

name: pause-on-hover countdown
description: Time-limited UI (DrawActionRow) uses interval countdown with progress bar, pauses on mouseenter, resumes on mouseleave

name: rest-api-route-pattern
description: REST API route pattern: standalone +server.ts under /api/v1/ calling services directly (not tRPC). Auth via middleware.ts utility module (not hook). Each handler: resolveAuth → rateLimit → requireScope → assertMapAccess → service call → serialize → envelope → jsonResponse. Share tokens bypass requireMapAccess via mapScope check.

title: resolveAuth accepts Pick<RequestEvent, 'request' | 'url'>
rationale: Avoids as-any casts at every call site since route handlers destructure event params. The function only needs request headers and URL search params.

content: filterStore.get() returns a defensive copy ([...array]) — callers cannot mutate internal  through the returned reference. Pattern to follow for any store method returning a mutable collection.

name: drawingstore-stop-recovery
description: drawingStore.stop() wraps TerraDraw instance.stop() in try/catch — logs error but always transitions to status:'stopped'. Prevents a TerraDraw throw from leaving the store stuck in 'ready' with a broken instance.

title: ST1-effect-ordering-safe
rationale: selectionToFeature and toolDismissFeature effects both write interactionState but cannot conflict — each reads currentType via untrack() before acting, both call centralized transitionTo(). Svelte 5 flushes effects in declaration order; the second effect sees state written by the first and no-ops. No guard needed.

title: ST4-filter-clear-reactivity
rationale: filterStore.clear() uses spread-replace on $state root, triggering Svelte 5 reactivity. MapEditor reads filterStore.applyToFeatures() inline in template and filterStore.hasFilters() in a reactive binding — both auto-refresh on _filters change. No explicit refresh trigger needed.

title: REST API v1 alongside tRPC
rationale: External apps need REST, internal frontend uses tRPC. Keeping them separate avoids adapter awkwardness and lets each surface be purpose-built. middleware.ts is a utility module called from route handlers, not a SvelteKit hook, to avoid tangling with hooks.server.ts.

title: geojson-api-cache
rationale: 10k-feature full-map GeoJSON queries saturated connection pool under 50-user concurrent load (p50: 16.8s). Cache with 30s TTL + invalidation on feature writes reduced p50 to 4ms. Always buffer+cache, never stream-only, because DB query is the bottleneck. Default limit lowered 50k→5k.

name: encodeCursor-accepts-string-or-date
description: encodeCursor in pagination.ts accepts Date|string because typedExecute (raw SQL) returns timestamps as strings while Drizzle ORM returns Date objects. Centralizing the conversion prevents crash when any list endpoint paginates.
IDOR in annotation PATCH/DELETE: handlers verified user had access to URL mapId but didn't check annotation.mapId matched
resolution: Fetch annotation first, compare mapId to URL param before operating. Applied same pattern as existing GET handler.

description: Null bytes in text/jsonb fields crash PostgreSQL with unhandled 500
resolution: Added stripNullBytes() sanitizer in API middleware, applied at JSON body parse boundary in all POST/PATCH handlers

description: Invalid parentId on annotation create causes unhandled FK violation 500
resolution: Catch FK violation and NOT_FOUND errors in create handler, return 422 VALIDATION_ERROR

name: drawing-escape-and-tool-switch-guards
description: DrawingToolbar Escape + tool-switch guards: Escape keydown $effect removes in-progress Terra Draw features (mode \!== 'static') and resets to select. Tool-sync $effect guards mode switch with window.confirm when inProgress.length > 0, cleaning up via removeFeatures before proceeding.

content: Destructive action confirmation pattern: use window.confirm() guards at the top of handler functions (handleRemove, deleteShare, handleDelete, deleteLayer). LayerPanel uses confirm() directly; others use window.confirm(). Dashboard delete-map uses onclick confirm on the form submit button. Pattern: check before any state mutation or async call.

Empty states in LayerPanel, AnnotationPanel, and Dashboard use actionable copy (jargon-free, with next-step buttons wired to existing handlers) rather than passive 'nothing here yet' messages. LayerPanel empty state uses Button component directly calling createLayer(); AnnotationPanel empty state guides users to click the map or pick a feature; Dashboard empty state includes a value proposition sentence.

name: localStorage-store-persistence
description: localStorage persistence pattern for Svelte 5 stores: export standalone save/load functions that read/write module-level state directly. Wire load in a one-shot $effect (stable dep like mapId), and save in a reactive $effect that iterates all layers to track the full filter state. Storage key uses prefix+mapId for per-map scoping. Remove key when empty to keep storage clean. Silently swallow all storage/parse errors for private-browsing safety.

content: MapEditor.svelte handleKeydown: input/textarea guard (lines 580-582) fires before all shortcuts. Undo/redo (Ctrl+Z/Shift+Z) and tool switching (1/2/3) are added below the guard. Tool shortcuts are gated on !designMode to avoid firing in style-editor mode.

name: copy-to-clipboard-keyed-feedback
description: Copy-to-clipboard feedback pattern: use copiedKey = $state<string | null>(null) to track which button was just clicked. Set to a string key on success, clear with setTimeout 2000ms. Allows multiple independent copy buttons in the same component, each showing 'Copied!' only for itself.

name: activity-feed-filtering-localStorage
description: ActivityFeed uses client-side $derived for filtering (no server round-trip) and $effect for localStorage last-visit tracking with try/catch guards for unavailable storage. Cleanup via effect return fn updates the timestamp on unmount.

name: viewport-localStorage-persistence
description: localStorage viewport persistence: saveViewportLocally/loadViewportLocally on mapStore (map.svelte.ts) use felt-viewport-{mapId} key; +page.svelte loads local override before server default in onMount; MapEditor registers unconditional moveend $effect on mapStore.mapInstance to save on every pan/zoom. Mirrors filters.svelte.ts pattern (try/catch, JSON.parse, key prefix scoped by id).

name: Extract pure derived logic to testable store
description: Export bare functions for unit testing and a reactive factory (createXStore) for component use. Factory uses $derived(getRows()) with getter properties. Only pure functions need node vitest — reactive factory is untested at unit level.

name: interaction-modes-store
description: InteractionState union, SelectedFeature, PickedFeatureRef, and transitionTo() live in lib/stores/interaction-modes.svelte.ts. MapEditor binds 'const interactionState = $derived(interactionModes.state)' and destructures transitionTo. The 4 $effect blocks stay in MapEditor (depend on component-local activeSection/designMode). Store exports: interactionModes.state getter + transitionTo().

name: viewport-pagination-store
description: Viewport pagination extracted from MapEditor into createViewportStore() (viewport.svelte.ts). Uses factory function with ViewportDeps interface for testability. bindMap(map) attaches/detaches moveend listener and returns a cleanup fn suitable for $effect return. AbortController prevents stale responses from racing fetches. Debounce (300ms) on moveend resets page to 1 before fetching.

content: Store factories accept a deps object (e.g. ViewportDeps interface) rather than importing globals directly. This allows unit tests to inject mock fetchFn, getActiveLayer, isLargeLayer, getMap, and onError without module-level vi.mock calls.

name: admin-route-consolidation
description: Admin route consolidation: replace multiple sub-routes (audit/, storage/, jobs/) with a single +page.server.ts using Promise.all for all admin data, and a single +page.svelte wiring AdminScreen contract. Sub-route +layout.svelte deleted; +layout.server.ts (isAdmin guard) kept. AuditLogEntry type was missing from shared-types — had to port audit-log.ts schema from web-next worktree.

title: web-next-merge-path-a
rationale: Path A avoids duplicating server stack. Screen contract pattern means only route files change. MapEditor reuse avoids rewriting 800-line component.

name: form-action-ui-adaptation
description: Web-next screen components use async callback actions (onLogin, onUpdate). SvelteKit form actions need use:enhance + named form fields. Adaptation: don't use callback-based screens for auth — write thin route svelte with new UI components (GlassPanel, Button) and use:enhance forms. For non-auth screens (dashboard, settings, admin), wire callbacks to tRPC mutations + invalidateAll().

content: Design token mapping for reskin: bg-slate-900→bg-surface-lowest, bg-slate-800→bg-surface-container, bg-slate-700→bg-surface-container-low, bg-slate-600→bg-surface-high, text-slate-200/300→text-on-surface, text-slate-400→text-on-surface-variant, text-slate-500→text-on-surface-variant/70, text-blue-400→text-primary, bg-blue-600→bg-primary-container, ring-blue-500→ring-primary, border-white/10→border-white/5. Section headers use text-[10px] font-bold text-primary uppercase tracking-widest.

name: parallel-css-reskin
description: Parallel subagent CSS reskin dispatch: group components by directory (map/, data/, style/), give each agent the same token mapping table, let them replace_all mechanical patterns. 22 files in 3 parallel agents completed in ~3min with zero conflicts.

title: reskin-gestalt-remediation-plan
rationale: Hotspots: ImportDialog(5), AnnotationPanel(6), ExportDialog(4), ShareDialog(5), GeoprocessingPanel(4). Key patterns: SILENT FAIL(10), NO FEEDBACK(12), HIDDEN REQ(8), RACE(7). Remediate P0 (silent fails/races) → P1 (feedback/dead ends) → P2 (jargon/labels). See STATE.md for full findings.

name: ux-gestalt-remediation
description: After reskinning 30+ components independently, shadow walk revealed 46 UX issues. Remediated in 2 tiers: P0 (10 critical — silent failures, race conditions) and P1 (19 high — no feedback, dead ends, hidden requirements). Pattern: reskin creates visual cohesion but breaks flow gestalt. Must trace user journeys end-to-end after cosmetic changes.

title: optimistic-concurrency-version-column
rationale: Two users (or two tabs) can silently overwrite each other's map/layer changes. Integer version column + atomic WHERE clause rejects stale writes. Optional version during rollout for backward compat. Stepping stone to real-time collaboration.

name: terra-draw-single-owner-mode-switch
description: Terra Draw mode switches must go through a single owner (the  DT:syncToolToTerraDraw). setTool() sets selectionStore.activeTool only — the effect handles setMode(). Dual-write (both setTool and effect calling setMode) causes race conditions when Terra Draw's select mode has internally-selected features.

title: web-next screen/contract migration complete
rationale: Pragmatic middle: completing the migration pattern without a full MapEditor decomposition. Stores remain as the reactive layer for sub-components. Full store-to-prop migration is a future phase.

description: Pre-existing type errors: (1) layers.svelte.ts:65 references 'version' property not in shared Layer type — schema/type desync from optimistic concurrency work. (2) REST API +server.ts endpoints pass unknown request body fields without type narrowing — runtime crash risk. (3) Annotation content type allows null from DB but app type expects discriminated union or undefined — exactOptionalPropertyTypes mismatch.
resolution: Not yet resolved. Layer version needs added to shared-types Layer. REST endpoints need zod parsing or type narrowing. Annotation content needs null handling at API boundary.

title: Pure error utility over toastStore-coupled helper
rationale: Can't import .svelte module exports from .ts files. getUserMessage() returns string, callers toast it. isVersionConflict() detects PRECONDITION_FAILED/CONFLICT codes. Replaces ad-hoc (err as {message?:string})?.message pattern across 8+ catch blocks.

content: exactOptionalPropertyTypes: optional callback/nullable props in Svelte 5 components must use '| undefined' in the type (e.g., onclose?: (() => void) | undefined). Without it, passing undefined explicitly fails. Third-party library bind: directives may need type assertions (bind:map={instance as Map}).

title: brownfield-iter3-priority-order
rationale: No current users — first-impression quality outranks data-corruption prevention

title: modal-focus-restoration-via-previousFocus
rationale: Simplest approach — no focus-trap library, no returnFocusTo prop needed

title: undo-after-server-confirm
rationale: Prevents phantom undo entries for failed saves — rules out optimistic undo with rollback

title: transitionTo-pure-state-machine
rationale: DrawingToolbar effect handles tool sync reactively — decouples interaction modes from selection

title: setActiveTool-no-auto-clear-selection
rationale: Hidden side effects in store setters cause bugs when multiple effects call setActiveTool in same tick

title: brownfield-waves-3-5-complete
rationale: No current users — shipped all waves in single session to clear UX debt before production deploy.

name: dual-auth-divergence
description: tRPC (session/Lucia) and REST v1 (API keys) have divergent security properties — tRPC lacks disabledAt check and rate limiting; REST v1 has both. Annotation image upload uses a third REST path outside tRPC.

name: worker-parser-duplication
description: services/worker/src/index.ts (669 LOC) reimplements all 5 format parsers inline instead of using apps/web/src/lib/server/import/ library. Bug fixes must be applied to both locations.

content: components/collaboration/ contains dead stubs (ActivityFeed 55 LOC, ShareDialog 55 LOC) not imported. Active versions live in components/map/.

title: codebase-diagnostics-full-sweep
rationale: Full 8-level architecture analysis of 13 subsystems. Produced 14 docs, 7 seeds (1 critical, 3 high, 3 medium). Key: disabled-user auth gap, no CI quality gate, worker untested.

title: auth-disabledAt-verified-safe
rationale: Deep drill verified: hooks.server.ts checks disabledAt upstream + admin.toggleDisabled calls lucia.invalidateUserSessions(). Initial sweep flagged this as critical — disproved by reading actual code.

name: mapeditor-decomposition-seams
description: MapEditor.svelte (930 LOC, 62 commits) has 6 extraction seams: StatusBar, DialogVisibility, LayerDataManager, InteractionModeBridge, KeyboardShortcuts, ViewportSave. Extraction order prioritizes zero-risk first, highest-payoff third. Post-extraction target: ~500 LOC.

title: codebase-diagnostics-drill-2-complete
rationale: Deep drill of 5 subsystems produced 9 new docs at zoom levels 5-8. Key findings: worker retry duplication risk, geoprocessing no timeout, dead sync import path, store dependency graph minimal circular deps.

name: store-isolation-verified
description: 8 map-editor stores have minimal import-time coupling — only interactionModes imports selectionStore. undoStore has runtime-only coupling via command closures. All other stores: zero cross-dependencies.

content: All 11 sampled test files classify as Purposeful (100%). Zero trivial/fragile/orphaned tests. Conventions: drizzleChain mock pattern, spec-style names, >=1 adversarial case per file, @vitest-environment node header.

title: cursor-pagination-backward-compat
rationale: Comment pagination returns flat array when no limit, {items,nextCursor} when limit provided. Avoids breaking existing callers.

content: Signup INSERT wrapped in try/catch for PostgreSQL 23505 (unique_violation). SELECT check kept for common case, try/catch is safety net for TOCTOU race.

title: mapeditor-decomposition-complete
rationale: 930 LOC with 14 effects and 62 commits of churn. Extraction seams identified by architecture docs. Script LOC reduced from 503 to 318.

title: cache-invalidation-unified
rationale: DrawingToolbar invalidates TanStack cache but MapEditor bypassed it via direct tRPC call. Unified on fetchQuery so invalidation propagates automatically.

content: import-engine package (packages/import-engine) is the single source for all format parsers. Web import modules and worker are thin wrappers: parse via import-engine then persist. Layer 0/1 deps only (shared-types + geo-engine).

title: MapEditorState class-based state consolidation
rationale: 5 effect chains between interactionModes/selection/drawing stores caused race conditions and required untrack guards. Class-based atomic methods eliminate all cross-store effects.

title: import-engine shared parser package
rationale: Web and worker duplicated 6 format parsers (686 LOC in worker alone). Single package eliminates drift and enables future browser-side parsing.

title: MapEditorState consolidation verified clean
rationale: 3 stores + 5 bridge effects → 1 class + 0 effects. 13 boundary crossings all uniform 2024+ era. No endorheic basins, acceptable stream capture. Cache gap resolved via TanStack fetchQuery unification.

content: components/collaboration/ directory removed — ActivityFeed and ShareDialog dead stubs (55 LOC each) no longer exist on disk. ShareDialog now lives in components/map/ at 358 LOC.

name: collaboration-subsystem-deep-drill
description: Collaboration subsystem deep drill (L5-L8): components/collaboration/ removed, all live UI in components/map/ (ShareDialog, GuestCommentPanel) and screens/ (ShareViewerScreen, EmbedScreen). 4 tRPC routers (shares, comments, collaborators, events). Guest auth is token-only publicProcedure with no rate limiting. Role hierarchy: viewer<commenter<editor<owner. Activity feed backend exists but has no UI consumer.

title: import-worker-deep-drill-complete
rationale: Deep drill of Import Worker subsystem (#13) at zoom levels L5-L8. 431 LOC monolith, 9 deadwood deps, 3 endorheic basins, 0 test files.

title: Reference-driven enhancement: audit-first, flow-driven execution approach chosen over single-pass or feature-first
rationale: Audit-first prevents rework by surfacing cross-cutting dependencies before implementation begins

content: 887-line MapCanvas monolith identified as hottest file (11 findings across 5 flows). svelte-maplibre reference shows declarative child composition pattern. Each extracted component renders inside the existing MapLibre parent.

FLI already uses svelte-maplibre-gl declaratively but ignores its interaction model. Manual 300ms click dedup, paint-based highlighting, top-level popup rendering are all unnecessary. Reference Layer.svelte provides these for free.

description: Infinite recursion bug found during audit. handleCreate at DashboardScreen.svelte:26-34 calls itself. Guarded only by creatingMap flag but first call recurses before check.
resolution: Replace recursive self-call with actions.onCreate(title) delegation

content: svelte-maplibre-gl v1.0.3 does NOT have manageHoverState, eventsIfTopMost, hoverCursor, or beforeLayerType — these exist only in the reference svelte-maplibre library. FLI must implement hover/interaction using FeatureState component + manual onmouseenter/onmouseleave handlers on layers.

GeoJSONSource components must include promoteId="id" when using FeatureState for hover/selection highlighting — MapLibre requires numeric IDs or promoteId for setFeatureState to work with string UUID feature IDs.

Hover-aware paint uses feature-state expressions ['case', ['boolean', ['feature-state', 'hover'], false], hoverOpacity, baseOpacity] — no paint rebuild needed. Symbol layers excluded (labels, not interactive features).

StylePanel uses pendingColor/pendingOpacity local state to split oninput (preview only, no layersStore mutation) from onchange (flush to layersStore once per drag gesture) — prevents layerRenderCache from recomputing on every slider tick

Feature-state selection highlight: getHoverAwarePaint() accepts optional highlightColor param and bakes 'selected' feature-state into paint expressions statically; MapCanvas adds <FeatureState selected=true> for editorState.selectedFeature — cache no longer references selectedFeature

title: click-dedup-event-identity
rationale: Replaced 300ms timestamp CLICK_DEDUP_MS hack with DOM event-identity check (e.originalEvent === _lastClickEvent). Overlapping layers share the same originalEvent — first handler wins, zero artificial delay

content: SvelteKit error() is typed 'never' but narrowing of locals.user doesn't flow through async closures (e.g. inside Promise.all map callbacks). Use 'throw error(...)' explicitly AND extract 'const user = locals.user' right after the top-level null-guard. Then pass 'user.id' to inner closures. The extracted const narrows via the top-level early-return.

<svelte:head> tags cannot be placed inside {#if} blocks (svelte_meta_invalid_placement error). To narrow a discriminated union union for both <svelte:head> title and page body, keep <svelte:head> at top-level with a $derived ternary for the title string, and place the body-narrow {#if 'error' in data}{:else} wrapper around the page content.

Under exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true, 'userId?: string' (optional) is NOT equivalent to 'userId?: string | undefined' (optional + explicit undefined). If a caller passes a value of type 'string | undefined', you need the latter. Same applies to function signature shapes used as TypeScript structural targets (e.g. SnapshotFeature.id? must be 'string | number | undefined' to accept terra-draw's GeoJSONStoreFeatures).

name: typed-paginated-cursor-query
description: Paginated list handlers using typedExecute<T>(sql) + encodeCursor(last.createdAt, last.id): type the generic concretely (e.g. 'type MapListRow = { id: string; created_at: string | Date; ... }'), then 'const last = items[items.length - 1]' gives 'MapListRow | undefined' and encodeCursor() typechecks cleanly. Using typedExecute<Record<string, unknown>> makes downstream fields 'unknown' and forces 'as string | Date' casts at call sites. Row types are local to the handler (not exported) since each SELECT has a different projection.
